title: Novo Nordisk names new General Manager for GCC
summary: The Gulf markets have become an integral part of Novo Nordisk’s global growth strategy
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
FILE PHOTO: The logo of pharmaceutical company Novo Nordisk is displayed in front of its offices in Bagsvaerd, Copenhagen, Denmark, February 4, 2026. REUTERS/Tom Little. Image used for illustrative purpose.

The Gulf markets have become an integral part of Novo Nordisk’s global growth strategy

Staff Writer | TradeArabia

Novo Nordisk, a leading global healthcare company headquartered in Denmark, has appointed Venkat Kalyan as the new General Manager for its GCC operations. 

An industry veteran, Kalyan brings nearly 30 years of experience in the pharmaceutical and healthcare sector, including 18 years at Novo Nordisk, most recently as General Manager of the Gulf Emerging Markets Cluster. 

His prior leadership experience spans across diverse markets such as India, Switzerland, Denmark, Middle Africa, South Africa and Gulf countries, said a statement from the Danish company.

In this role, Kalyan will oversee Novo Nordisk’s operations across UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman and Yemen, focusing on strengthening healthcare partnerships, advancing innovation and improving outcomes for patients living with chronic diseases.

The appointment reinforces the company’s confidence in the Gulf’s evolving healthcare ecosystem and the UAE’s growing role as a strategic centre for medical research, innovation, and partnership-led growth, said the company  statement.

On his new role, Kalyan said: “The Gulf markets hold real potential and are exceptionally well positioned to lead the next phase of healthcare transformation. I look forward to building on Novo Nordisk’s strong foundation in the region and working closely with all our healthcare stakeholders to improve outcomes for patients.”

With its rapidly evolving healthcare landscape, the Gulf markets have become an integral part of Novo Nordisk’s global growth strategy, as the company renews its commitment to expanding its impact across the region and advancing accessible and sustainable patient care systems for these communities, he added.
